reviews.author: Brandon T.
reviews.text: Came in Saturday at 8:30pm and they were out of carne asada. Tortillas felt stale. Owner was nice but the food was meh. 2/5.

reviews.author: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: BEST tacos al pastor in the Mission. Maria treats you like family. Cash only but they have a Venmo now.

reviews.author: Devon K.
reviews.text: Food is solid but the place is tiny and there's always a line. Lost a star because they're cash-only and the ATM down the block charges $5.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: Hidden gem. The salsa verde is unreal. The owner Maria remembered my order from a month ago. This is what neighborhood spots should feel like.

reviews.author: Tom W.
reviews.text: Waited 25 minutes for two tacos. No urgency. Will not return.

reviews.author: Maritza H.
reviews.text: Mi lugar favorito en la Mission. Maria es una joya y los tacos son autenticos. ¡Que no cierren nunca!

reviews.author: Ashley R.
reviews.text: Great food, great prices. Wish they took cards. Wish they had outdoor seating.

reviews.author: Marcus J.
reviews.text: Reviewed bomb. Tortillas were dry, beans were cold. Felt like an off night but disappointing.
